title: Incorrect Optimization of ArrayConstructor by Maglev Leads to Creation of Malformed JSArray Objects
bounty_rationale: High-quality report demonstrating controlled write in sandboxed renderer
description_snippet:
VULNERABILITY DETAILS

## 1 Why Crash?

After Maglev optimization, an incorrect `JSArray` object was created for `arr2`, leading to a crash when `arr2.join()` was executed. The abnormal `JSArray` object is as follows.

```
